prompt: I'm adding a navigation control to my fantasy app's top nav bar. When a user clicks their team name, they should see options to switch between their teams in different leagues. I'm trying to decide between using a dialog, a menu (role=menu), or a combobox. Which pattern should I use and why? The options are just a flat list of 3–5 team names that navigate to that team's page when selected.

assertions.text: Does NOT recommend role=menu for this use case
Does NOT recommend dialog for this use case
Does NOT recommend combobox for this use case
Recommends a disclosure button (<button> with aria-expanded) + list of links
Explains WHY role=menu is wrong (it's for app actions, not navigation links)
Recommends using <a> elements (links) rather than <button> elements for the team options
